product_overview: SkillBridge is an AI-powered web app that generates structured learning roadmaps and provides an interactive canvas for studying, quizzing, and guided tutoring while tracking progress and gamifying learning.
core_goals: Generate practical, step-by-step learning roadmaps from natural-language goals
Provide an interactive visual workspace (canvas) to follow and edit roadmaps
Offer node-level resources, AI tutoring, and quizzes to validate mastery
Track learner progress with XP, levels, streaks, and badges
Enable saving, exporting, and sharing roadmaps (read-only sharing)

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to register, log in, reset passwords, and establish authenticated sessions for access to protected app routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login/Register button to submit -> See /app (authenticated landing) -> Session persisted in local store

Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login/Register button to submit -> See authentication error message -> Click Forgot Password link -> Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email input field -> Click submit -> See password reset confirmation

features.name: Project & Roadmap Generation
features.description: Create projects and generate AI-driven learning roadmaps with user preferences (skill level, intensity, style, goal) and persist them to the user's account.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Click Create Project -> Enter roadmap goal text -> Select Skill level/Time intensity/Style/Goal preferences -> Click Generate Roadmap -> See roadmap rendered in canvas -> Roadmap auto-saved to project

Navigate to /app -> Click Create Project -> Enter unsupported goal or prohibited content -> Click Generate Roadmap -> See AI rejection or domain error message -> Option to edit prompt or choose a different goal

features.name: Visual Roadmap Workspace (Canvas)
features.description: Render and interact with roadmap nodes and edges on a React Flow canvas supporting selection, pan/zoom, edit mode, drag/drop, undo/redo, autosave, minimap and global progress indicator.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> View node graph -> Click on nodes to open node detail panel -> Use pan/zoom controls -> Observe global progress indicator update when nodes completed
Navigate to /app -> Enter edit mode -> Drag node to new position -> Make several edits -> Click Undo -> Click Redo -> Observe autosave error message if network fails -> Retry save

features.name: Node Detail Experience
features.description: Open a node detail panel that provides Resources, AI Tutor, Notes, and Quiz tabs with resource tracking, note persistence, and prerequisite awareness.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> View node graph -> Click on nodes to open node detail panel -> Switch to Resources tab -> Click resource card to open resource -> Resource open tracked in node

Navigate to /app -> View node graph -> Click on nodes to open node detail panel -> Observe locked quiz or action due to unmet prerequisites -> See prerequisite message and required dependencies listed

features.name: Quiz and Mastery
features.description: Run node-level quizzes (5 multiple-choice questions, 4 options each, 5-minute timer) with pass threshold and XP rewards; persist and cache quiz results.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> View node graph -> Click on nodes to open node detail panel -> Open Quiz tab -> Click Start Quiz -> Answer 5 questions -> Click Submit before timer ends -> See pass message and +100 XP if >=80% -> Topic marked complete

Navigate to /app -> View node graph -> Click on nodes to open node detail panel -> Open Quiz tab -> Click Start Quiz -> Let 5-minute timer expire -> Auto-submit answers -> See fail message if score <80% -> Option to retry or review cached questions

features.name: AI Tutor and Chat
features.description: Provide project-level and node-level chat with persisted history, code/markdown rendering, generation controls (stop/regenerate), feedback actions, and provider fallback handling.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> View node graph -> Click on nodes to open node detail panel -> Open AI Tutor tab -> Type question -> Click Send -> See AI response with markdown/code -> Chat message persisted

Navigate to /app -> Open AI Tutor -> Type complex prompt -> Click Send -> See provider error or rate-limit -> System falls back to alternate provider or shows retry/regenerate option -> User clicks Regenerate -> Receive new response or error message

features.name: Profile, Progress & Gamification
features.description: Display and update user stats (XP, level, streaks, learning minutes, quiz stats, completed topics) and show badges and certificate triggers based on milestones.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Observe XP and level display -> View current and longest streak -> See completed topics and quiz stats
Navigate to /profile -> Observe stale data due to API rate limit -> See error banner prompting user to retry -> Click Retry -> Data refreshes or shows persistent error

features.name: Sharing, Export & Certificate
features.description: Share read-only roadmaps via a public link, export canvas as PNG, and present a downloadable certificate at 100% completion.
user_flows: Navigate to /app -> Open project menu -> Click Share -> Copy public link -> Navigate to /share/:roadmapId -> See read-only roadmap rendered
Navigate to /app -> Complete all nodes to 100% -> Click Download Certificate -> Certificate modal opens -> Click Export PDF -> Download certificate file
Navigate to /share/:roadmapId -> Attempt to access a private roadmap -> See 404 or permission error message

features.name: Settings & Billing (Beta)
features.description: Allow users to change preferences (appearance, editor toggles, language) and view billing/plan information (beta UI; payments not active).
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Toggle dark/light mode -> Toggle AI panel preference -> Change language -> Click Save -> See confirmation and preferences persisted
Navigate to /billing -> View plan comparison -> Click Upgrade or Start Trial -> See beta notice informing payments are not active -> Option to contact support

routes.description: Main application canvas with learning pathways/nodes

features.name: Learning Canvas
features.description: View and interact with learning nodes
user_interactions: Click on nodes to open node detail panel
